question: Which exact thresholds, severities, maximum count, and deterministic tie-breakers should govern Attention Items without becoming prescriptive advice or notification policy?
context: Before Attention Item activation, a privacy-safe spike must establish numeric thresholds and demonstrate zero false high-severity outcomes. The PRD fixes the low, medium, and high vocabulary, hard maximum count, stable tie-breakers, and CHANNELS delivery boundary; unsupported threshold or delivery behavior remains excluded.
decision: Attention Items remain formally deferred until private evidence establishes numeric thresholds with zero false high-severity results. Any activated v1 policy must use low, medium, and high severity, cap output at five items, and order by severity descending, released signal-kind rank, stable category identity with totals first, then metric code. CHANNELS alone owns notification behavior.
